description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine SWSBLK_2, and is implemented by a call to SWSBLK_2. Use this API to return the switched shunt ‘1’ number of steps and zero sequence step size in Mvar for block IBLK. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr, ival, v = swsblz2(ibus, iblk)

return_values.name: v
return_values.description: Admittance in mvar per step in block ‘iblk’. (output).
